name: @jeswr/federation-codegen
description: Ontology-driven data-model codegen for the Solid app suite — deterministic OWL/RDFS + SHACL → model.d.ts (types) + model.json (a fidelity-asserted verified projection of shapes.ttl) + model.js (a fixed-template shim over @jeswr/model-runtime). Includes the tier-a structural admission validator and the build-time fidelity assertion.
author: Jesse Wright

scripts.lint: biome check src scripts test examples/bookmark/facade.ts
scripts.lint:fix: biome check --write src scripts test examples/bookmark/facade.ts
scripts.gate: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build && npm run check:dist
